Functions
fza_hellfire_fnc_checkLos

Description: Local clone of ace_missileguidance_fnc_checkLos. Checks LOS from the seeker's visual center of mass rather than its raw getPosASL origin, which (for the helicopter pre-launch, or off-center projectile models) can sit far from where the seeker/sensor actually "looks" from.  Parameters: _seeker  - Seeker object (helicopter pre-launch or projectile) _target  - Target object _checkVisibilityTest - (Optional) Use checkVisibility instead of raw terrain/object intersection [true] Returns: Has LOS <BOOL> Author: Snow(Dryden)
